summary: The diff addresses all three requirements. REQ-1 is handled in backend/main.mo with claimAdmin storing the caller principal and checkAdminStatus comparing caller against stored admin. REQ-2 is partially addressed in useQueries.ts with identity checks on mutations and actor invalidation in LoginButton.tsx, but useActor.ts and useActorWrapper.ts themselves are not shown as modified in the diff. REQ-3 is addressed in AdminGuard.tsx with React Query scoped to the current principal, re-fetch on actor change, and invalidation on logout.

missing_requirements.requirement: Audit frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts and frontend/src/hooks/useActorWrapper.ts to ensure the actor is always initialized with the authenticated identity and rebuilt whenever the identity changes.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows neither useActor.ts nor useActorWrapper.ts in the modified files list. The requirement explicitly calls for auditing and fixing these two files, but no changes to them are evidenced in the diff.
